name: MVP - Viewpoint TTS Video Clip Composer

parameters.formDescription: Upload visual assets, enter a viewpoint, choose official Doubao voices, and create an edited 16:9 MP4.

values.placeholder: 输入你对这件事情的观点、角度或想表达的核心判断

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $json.llmApiMode === 'responses' ? { model: $env.DOUBAO_LLM_MODEL || $env.ARK_MODEL_NAME, input: $json.llmMessages.map((message) => ({ role: message.role, content: [{ type: 'input_text', text: message.content }] })), temperature: Number($env.DOUBAO_LLM_TEMPERATURE || 0.7), max_output_tokens: 3000, thinking: { type: 'disabled' } } : { model: $env.DOUBAO_LLM_MODEL || $env.ARK_MODEL_NAME, messages: $json.llmMessages, temperature: Number($env.DOUBAO_LLM_TEMPERATURE || 0.7), response_format: { type: 'json_object' } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, jobId: $json.jobId, videoPath: $json.videoPath, audioPath: $json.audioPath, jobDir: $json.jobDir, ffmpegLog: $json.ffmpegLog, size: $json.size, generatedScriptTitle: $json.generatedScriptTitle, generatedScriptSummary: $json.generatedScriptSummary, generatedScriptText: $json.generatedScriptText, scriptMode: $json.scriptMode, selectedVoices: $json.selectedVoices, ttsDuration: $json.ttsDuration } }}
